sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.general_idea: Migrate entity annotations from MyBatis-Plus to MyBatis-Flex to align with the framework upgrade.
sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.human_impl: Replaced implicit MP annotations with explicit @Table("sora_user") and @Id(keyType = KeyType.Auto) from com.mybatisflex.annotation.

sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.general_idea: Expand the User entity to include full user profile fields and change primary key type.
sora-common/sora-core/src/main/java/com/.human_impl: Changed userId (Long) to id (String) and added fields for sex, birthday, password, phone, email, roleLevel, createTime, banned, and disabled.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
Upgrade Spring Boot to version 3.3.2 to support Java 21 and access latest features.
Upgrade Spring Cloud to 2023.0.1 to maintain compatibility with Spring Boot 3.3.x.
Upgrade Spring Cloud Alibaba to 2023.0.1.0 for compatibility with the new Spring Cloud version.
Upgrade Nacos client to 2.3.2 to ensure compatibility with the updated Spring Cloud Alibaba stack.
Replace MyBatis-Plus with MyBatis-Flex as the new ORM framework.
Remove the dynamic-datasource-spring-boot-starter dependency, likely migrating to MyBatis-Flex's built-in multi-datasource support or a different strategy.
Add explicit dependency on Jakarta Servlet API 6.0.0, required for Spring Boot 3.x which uses Jakarta EE instead of Java EE.
Upgrade Logback to 1.5.6 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and SLF4J 2.x.
Enable the -parameters compiler argument to preserve parameter names in bytecode, required for Spring Boot 3.x parameter resolution.

sora-common/sora-core/pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Servlet API dependency required for Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 migration.
